description: Letter from ʿAyyāsh b. Ṣedaqa, in Alexandria, to Nahray b. Nissim, in Fustat. Dating: ca. 1050 CE. ʿAyyāsh buys goods in Alexandria for Nahray. The goods are being sent in six ships in the Nile to Fustat. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 3, #477) VMR
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מאלכסנדריה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
